Flat days removed from research time while a Combat Drone Replicator is installed in the hub.
Blueprint copies an improved hub also produces per item. Un-improved hubs produce no blueprint and only stock the Private Arsenal.
Items researched in parallel per type equals this value times the hub tier divided by the item slot size. 2 gives 6 weapon slots at tier 3.
Slots one weapon takes up. Higher means fewer weapons researched at once.
Slots one fighter wing takes up. Higher means fewer fighters researched at once.
Slots one ship takes up. Higher means fewer ships researched at once.

fieldName: Sell reverse-engineered ships in fleet screen (Tier 3)
fieldDescription: When on, a Tier 3 hub's Private Arsenal stocks reverse-engineered ships and lets you buy them directly in the fleet screen, skipping the need for Heavy Industry. Off by default.
Write verbose reverse-engineering logs to starsector.log.
